menu.name: Chicken Tikka
menu.description: Tender chunks of chicken marinated in aromatic spices, grilled over charcoal to smoky perfection.

menu.name: Fish Tikka
menu.description: Fresh Kenyan fish fillets marinated in tangy tikka masala, flame-grilled for a flaky, smoky bite.

menu.name: Paneer Tikka
menu.description: Soft cottage cheese cubes with capsicum and onions, charred beautifully in a tandoor-style grill.

menu.name: Chicken Chooza
menu.description: Whole spring chicken marinated overnight in signature Nargis spice blend, slow-roasted over open flame.

menu.name: Seekh Kebab
menu.description: Hand-minced spiced meat pressed onto skewers and grilled over charcoal embers.

menu.name: Samosa (4 pcs)
menu.description: Crisp golden pastry filled with spiced potatoes and peas, served with tamarind chutney.

menu.name: Garlic Naan
menu.description: Fluffy leavened bread brushed with garlic butter, baked in a clay tandoor.

menu.name: Mango Lassi
menu.description: Chilled blended yoghurt with fresh Kenyan mangoes, slightly sweet and perfectly refreshing.

special_offers.title: Family Feast
special_offers.description: 2x Chicken Tikka + 1x Chicken Chooza + 4x Garlic Naan + 2x Mango Lassi

special_offers.title: BBQ Duo
special_offers.description: Fish Tikka + Chicken Tikka + 2x Garlic Naan

special_offers.title: Vegetarian Delight
special_offers.description: Paneer Tikka + Samosa (4pcs) + Garlic Naan + Mango Lassi

reviews.author: Shemina S.
reviews.text: Nargis Restaurant is a long-standing, beloved culinary institution in Nairobi. Renowned for its truly delicious barbeque — the menu offers a tempting array of expertly grilled dishes. The chicken tikka is simply outstanding.

reviews.author: Jasmine A.
reviews.text: You go to this restaurant for the DELICIOUS spicy BBQ meat. The flavours are incredible — smoky, spiced, and authentic. One of Nairobi's hidden gems for Indian BBQ lovers.

reviews.author: Yasmin R. Mawani
reviews.text: Most amazing delicious food with outstanding services. Highly recommended to try! The chicken chooza was a revelation — tender, perfectly spiced, and smoky. Will be back soon!

reviews.author: TrailBlazer1152
reviews.text: Ordered takeaway and unfortunately had a billing issue. Hope management addresses transparency with receipts. The food itself was still tasty.
